name: Peanut, Raisin and Chocolate Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1 Beat egg white until frothy.
2 Gradually add sugar and continue beating until light in texture.
3 Stir in raisins, peanuts, and chocolate chips.
4 Place mounds of the mixture on a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper (or buttered and floured).
5 Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until browned.
6 Cool. Makes: 24 candies
